title: SP500 0DTE Signal Analysis: Why November 2025 Could Create Major Moves
author: henryzhangpku
selftext:
Just uncovered something interesting in the SPY data for November 2025 0DTE contracts...

For those tracking short-term SPY movements, this could represent one of the clearer setups we've seen projected this far out. The full breakdown includes specific strike levels, timing windows, and risk management parameters.

If you're serious about 0DTE strategies, this is the kind of edge that separates reactive trading from anticipatory positioning.
